hero.headline: Master the Art of Debate with your Personal AI Coach.
hero.headline_rich: Master the Art of Debate with your Personal <gradient>AI</gradient> Coach.
hero.subheadline: Practice solo, get real-time feedback, and crush your next competition. Designed for the next generation of Vietnamese debaters.
hero.announcement: AI Coach debates live with you

features.headline: Your AI Toolkit for Victory
features.subheadline: Powerful features built for competitive performance.

solo_practice.title: Solo Practice
solo_practice.description: Choose motions, set sides, and start the clock. Full WSDC & BP support.

transcription.title: Live Transcription
transcription.description: Ultra-accurate speech-to-text integration for post-speech flow review.

ai_analysis.title: AI Analysis
ai_analysis.description: Instant scoring in Content, Structure, Language, and Persuasion categories.

growth.title: Smart Growth
growth.description: Actionable feedback and model arguments to improve your flow instantly.

courses.headline: Structured Learning Paths
courses.subheadline: Go beyond practice — master debate with guided courses built for Vietnamese students.

foundations.title: Foundations of Competitive Debate
foundations.description: Master the fundamentals of argumentation, research, and delivery. Perfect for beginners and intermediate debaters.

speaking.title: Public Speaking Mastery
speaking.description: Build confidence, refine delivery, and learn advanced persuasion techniques for competitions and beyond.

step1.title: Learn
step1.description: Take structured courses with articles, quizzes, and video lessons on debate fundamentals.

step2.title: Practice
step2.description: Choose a topic, speak into the app, and get real-time transcription of your speech.

step3.title: Get Feedback
step3.description: Receive AI-powered scoring and detailed feedback on content, structure, and delivery.

step4.title: Ask AI Coach
step4.description: Chat with your personal AI debate coach anytime for tips, explanations, and practice.

0.quote: DebateLab finally gave us the Truong Teen experience at home. The AI structure analysis helped me jump from regionals to the national finals!

1.quote: I practiced on DebateLab 15 minutes every night, and saw a clear difference in 2 weeks. The feedback is more detailed than a real coach!

2.quote: The AI Coach explains WSDC format way better than textbooks. Our whole team now uses DebateLab to warm up before tournaments.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! DebateLab is completely free. Just create an account and start practicing.
faq.q2: What do I need to get started?
faq.a2: Just a computer with a microphone (or headphones with a mic) and Chrome browser. That's it!
faq.q3: How accurate is the AI scoring?
faq.a3: DebateLab's AI analyzes 4 criteria: Content, Structure, Language, and Persuasion. Detailed feedback for each category tells you exactly what to improve.

finalCta.headline: Ready to win your next debate?
finalCta.subheadline: Join the most advanced training platform for debaters in Vietnam. No more practicing to an empty room.

footer.tagline: Building the world's most intelligent debate training platform for future leaders.

demo_intro.headline: Let's try a quick warm-up round!
demo_intro.subheadline: You'll get 45 seconds to speak from one side. This is a warm-up speaking sample, not the full debate engine.

motivations: Time to level up your rhetoric!
home.continue_learning_subtitle: Pick up where you left off in the admin course experience and spot weak points in the learner flow.
home.course_preview_note: This opens the current admin-only course flow, so you can inspect the learner-facing experience before wider rollout.
home.course_empty_admin_note: Once you enroll in or set up a course, it will appear here as your main continuation card.
home.course_empty_student_note: Course learning will show up here once course access is opened beyond admin accounts.
home.course_access_limited: Course continuation is still limited to admin accounts right now.
home.single_active_course: You only have one active course at the moment, so it stays front and center here.

streak_messages.zero: Start your streak today and turn your next practice into momentum.
streak_messages.steady: {count} days in a row. Your consistency is paying off.
streak_messages.on_fire: {count} days strong. You're properly on fire now.

home.recent_practice_subtitle: See how your latest speaking and debate runs are stacking up.
home.welcome_banner_subtitle: Jump into a practice debate and sharpen your skills.
home.ask_ai_coach_subtitle: Get instant help with debate techniques
home.focus_orbs_subtitle: Use Orbs to unlock deeper debate runs and premium actions.
home.launchpad_title: Choose the kind of session you want right now
home.launchpad_subtitle: Jump straight into speaking or debate with a preset starting point, then pick your topic inside the practice studio.

speaking.title: Speaking Practice
speaking.description: One clean speech with feedback on clarity, structure, confidence, and understandable English.

debate_quick.title: Quick Debate
debate_quick.description: A faster debate round when you want argument depth without committing to the full five-round flow.

debate_full.title: Full Round
debate_full.description: Run the full Trường Teen-style debate flow with the AI opponent and stronger clash practice.

home.weekly_chart_subtitle: A tighter view of how often you showed up this week.
home.weekly_chart_empty_subtitle: This card will fill out as soon as you log your first session this week.
home.weekly_chart_empty_note: No sessions yet this week. Start a speaking or debate run to bring this chart to life.
home.referral_subtitle: Invite friends to earn 3 Orbs each

courses.page_subtitle: Structured lessons to build your debate and speaking skills.
courses.empty_subtitle: Check back soon for new content!

detail.unlock_subtitle: Enroll to open lesson navigation, completion tracking, and the structured module path.
detail.follow_subtitle: Move through each module in order, keep track of completed lessons, and jump back into the first unfinished step.

lesson.subtitle: Continue through {course} with a clearer sense of where this lesson sits in the module and the overall course.

practice.summary_description: Review the setup before jumping into the full practice studio.
practice.launch_note: This opens the main practice studio with this topic prefilled, so you can keep learning flow inside the course but practice in the full DebateLab experience.
practice.coach_prep: Ask AI Coach to prep this

practice.page_subtitle: Select a topic, choose speaking or debate, configure your session, and start practicing.
practice.no_topics: No topics found in this category
practice.speaking_desc: Focus on clarity, confidence, and understandable English in a single speech.
practice.debate_desc: Focus on stance, clash, comparison, and impact in debate rounds.
practice.single_speech_desc: One prep + speech flow with speaking-focused feedback.
practice.full_desc: 5-round debate with AI opponent (Trường Teen style)
practice.ai_hints_desc: Shows brainstorm hints during preparation time
practice.speak_placeholder: Start speaking... your words will appear here

audioCheck.title: Audio Check
audioCheck.description: Turn on your speakers or plug in headphones, then tap below to test.

chat.sidebar_empty: Start a conversation with your AI Coach
chat.welcome_title: Hi! I'm your AI Debate Coach
chat.welcome_subtitle: Ask me anything about debate techniques, argumentation, public speaking, or let me help you practice.
chat.suggestion_opening: How do I structure a strong opening statement?

debate_stance.label: Strengthen my stance
debate_stance.prompt: Help me strengthen my stance on this motion.

weighing.label: Give me weighing
weighing.prompt: Give me the key weighing and comparison I should use in this debate.

clearer_english.label: Make this clearer
clearer_english.prompt: Help me say this more clearly in simple English.

stronger_opening.label: Stronger opening
stronger_opening.prompt: Give me a stronger opening statement for this topic.

rebuild_argument.label: Rebuild this argument
rebuild_argument.prompt: Rebuild this argument so the mechanism, weighing, and impact are much stronger.

test_assumptions.label: Test assumptions
test_assumptions.prompt: Test the assumptions in this case and show me the weakest links.

speech_structure.label: Structure my speech
speech_structure.prompt: Help me structure this speech into a clear opening, body, and closing.

sound_confident.label: Sound more confident
sound_confident.prompt: Help me make this speech sound more confident and natural.

lesson_key_idea.label: Key idea first
lesson_key_idea.prompt: Summarize the most important idea from this course lesson before I practice.

lesson_examples.label: Give examples
lesson_examples.prompt: Give me concrete examples I can use from this course lesson.

lesson_quiz.label: Quiz me on this
lesson_quiz.prompt: Quiz me on the key concepts from this course lesson before I practice.

lesson_drill.label: Turn into a drill
lesson_drill.prompt: Turn this course lesson into a short practice drill for me.

chat.error_message: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

lesson.bodyPlaceholder: Write your lesson content in Markdown...

quiz.explanationPlaceholder: Explain why this is the correct answer...

matching.shuffleHint: Students will see these shuffled. Enter the correct matches here.

fillBlank.instruction: Type your passage. Use __BLANK_1__, __BLANK_2__, etc. for blanks.
fillBlank.passagePlaceholder: The main purpose of a __BLANK_1__ is to counter the opponent's __BLANK_2__.

dragOrder.instructionPlaceholder: Arrange these items in the correct order.
dragOrder.orderHint: Enter items in the correct order. Students will see them shuffled.

player.matchTerms: Match each term to its definition
player.restrictedAccess: This course is available by invitation only.
player.previewSavedVersion: This preview reflects the saved version of the course. Save changes in the editor to refresh it.
player.previewNoTracking: Progress, enrollment, and completion tracking are hidden in preview mode. Open an activity to check the learner experience.
